items.titolo: Scalpers circle AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking for $600 or more — re-released CPU sees inconsistent inventory on release day
items.descrizione: Scalpers are trying to capitalize on the release of the Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking nearly double the CPU's suggested retail price.

items.titolo: Gemini 3.5 Flash permette di controllare il computer
items.descrizione: Google ha aggiunto la funzionalità Computer Use al modello Gemini 3.5 Flash, quindi è possibile creare agenti AI che controllano browser e interfacce. The post Gemini 3.5 Flash permette di controllare il computer appeare

items.titolo: Anthropic claims that China's Alibaba used 25,000 fake accounts and 28.8 million exchanges to illicitly 'distill' its Claude model — violations occurred from April to June 2026
items.descrizione: AI tech giant Alibaba, often considered as the Amazon of China, is being accused by Anthropic for using Claude to train its AI models. The American AI startup claimed that it traced over 25,000 accounts to operators that
